title: What Does Trauma-Responsive Change Actually Mean?
author: Dr. Lori L. Hall
excerpt: A short introduction to the difference between knowing about trauma and changing the programs, policies, procedures, and practices that shape people’s lives.

title: Why Systems Matter in Trauma Work
author: Dr. Lori L. Hall
excerpt: A reflection on why trauma-responsive work must look beyond individual behavior and examine the institutions, systems, and conditions that shape harm and healing.
